subcodes.first_line: Verily a glorious Book hath been sent unto thee. It is from Bahá, and it beginneth with the Name of God, the Most Wondrous, the Most Mighty, the Most Holy, the Most Exalted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارسل الیک کتاب کریم انه من البهاء و انه بسم الله الابدع الاعز الاقدس العلی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @composure; tranquillity; serenity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
